---
title: 'Snow Cometh!'
date: '2012-02-13T02:05:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '429084920144452917'
blogger_filename: '/2012/02/snow-cometh_12.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'News & Events'
---

This morning after church the kids saw how cold it was, and the clouds. They asked, "When is it going to snow?" for the unknownth time since it started getting cold in November. I said, "Let's command it to snow", so we all said "Sky, SNOW in Jesus Name!" And just before bed time, snow is now falling form the sky. Those are the moments when life is sweet. God's Word is true!
